title: Guilin, Guangxi — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Guilin, Guangxi: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Guilin is a city in Guangxi with a population of 4,931,000. World-famous for its dramatic karst mountain landscapes and Li River scenery, Guilin is China’s most iconic natural destination.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
